name: JetBrains Open Source Support
description: JetBrains offers free All Products Pack subscriptions for open-source project core teams, covering all JetBrains IDEs for development.

perks.title: All Products Pack
perks.description: Complimentary All Products Pack subscriptions for your core development team — use any JetBrains IDE.

perks.title: Free Non-Commercial Use
perks.description: WebStorm, Rider, CLion, RubyMine, and DataGrip are free for non-commercial/open-source use.

eligibility: Must be an actively maintained open-source project.
Must make valuable contributions to the software industry.
Projects are prioritized based on quality, innovation, and community impact.
applicationProcess: Apply through the JetBrains open-source application form.
Tell JetBrains what makes your project stand out.
